entries.quote: Prime members triple their shopping frequency once they start using it, and we've seen orders double every quarter since launch. Quick commerce is now the fastest-growing ecommerce business unit in India.
entries.signal: Amazon is treating India quick commerce as a strategic priority, not an experiment — Jassy's personal visit and public commitment signals board-level conviction.
entries.belief: [Inferred · High] Management believes India's instant-fulfilment shift is permanent and that Prime's loyalty lock-in can be leveraged to dominate the format at scale.
